kind: runtime-only refactor verification; no train, no checkpoint, no ship claim
host: linux CPU container, Python 3.12, bridge npm ci installed
changes: eval_runner: tree_edit reuses structural_similarity value; placeholder extraction and style stripping cached per source string
lang_core/graphql_js: process-lifetime cache for shutil.which('node'); bridge file stats stay live
lark_backend: structural_tokens() memoized (was a grammar-file disk read per constrained pick)
production_codec: per-piece regexes use precompiled module constants
twotower: precompiled repair regexes; lattice trajectory score lookup via path_key dict instead of O(n^2) paths.index()
compiler_draft: schema-type terminal map hoisted to module constant
mixture: task-weighted sampler hoists per-group family order/weights out of the per-draw loop
web observability: scoreboard()/model-card reads memoized behind (mtime_ns, size) stat fingerprints; deployment state read once per overview; _run_dir stats canonical path before globbing
web jobs: tail() reads a bounded end window instead of the whole log
meaningful_program: anti-gaming duplicate-subtree grouping via one bottom-up hash pass (was O(n^2) re-serialization)
grammar_diffusion: throwaway codec via shallow dict copies instead of deepcopy per eval record; topology decode reads per-phase bulk tolist() instead of ~6 per-node .item() syncs

equivalence_evidence.eval_metrics: 30 prediction/record pairs (incl. malformed quote/comma inputs where strip_style_literals is not idempotent): all metric values byte-identical vs HEAD implementation
equivalence_evidence.mixture: 3 sampling policies x 12 seeds x with/without task weights: draw sequences identical vs HEAD implementation
equivalence_evidence.anti_gaming_fingerprints: duplicate-subtree partitions identical vs HEAD on nested/excluded-key/scalar-typed ASTs (str-vs-bool and 1-vs-1.0 non-collision preserved)
equivalence_evidence.throwaway_codec: production_sequence_accuracy identical to deepcopy reference; source codec vocabulary verified unmutated
equivalence_evidence.web_payloads: overview/runs/scoreboards/checkpoints/system and every scoreboard kind byte-identical; cache freshness verified under file add, in-place modify, and delete

test_evidence: full pytest tree run with NODE_OPTIONS cleared and bridge installed: failure set identical to base commit c6a7d14 (5 pre-existing environment failures in agentv/eval_gates/loop stubs, 4 in gpu_multi_farm/lineage/scripts); zero new failures
functional_check: scripts/profile_generate --rounds 2 on committed playground_demo checkpoint completed with valid OpenUI sample outputs
not_claimed: no decode-latency speedup claim (no matched A/B perf-matrix run)
